cancel_anytime: Cancel anytime. Instant downgrade to Free.
card1_cue: What you get: current level, trend, and next action.
card1_desc: A live glycogen estimate for your current day. Use it to understand your readiness for high-intensity work and avoid under-fueling before key sessions.
card2_cue: What you get: trendline, risk windows, and confidence cues.
card2_desc: A rolling projection across upcoming days. It highlights when your plan may accumulate fatigue so you can correct fueling before performance drops.
card3_cue: What you get: practical targets you can execute without guesswork.
card3_desc: Pre, intra, and post-workout targets for carbs, hydration, and sodium based on your planned training and current state.
coach_output: "Based on your profile, you respond best to rest when HRV drops below 40ms. Let's take today off."

community.desc: Join our Discord server to ask questions, share feedback, and connect with other users. This is the fastest way to get help.
community.title: Community Support

context_desc: Most platforms analyze a workout in isolation. Coach Watts analyzes it in the context of your entire history, your nutrition, and your recovery.
cta.description: Join endurance athletes using Coach Watts to train smarter and fuel with confidence every day.
cta.headline: Ready to reach your peak?
cta_description: Join the community and start training smarter today.
demo_subtitle: Example timeline: same workout, different fueling strategies.
description: We don't just count steps. Coach Watts uses a multi-layered AI pipeline to construct a "Digital Twin" of your physiology.
disclaimer: Fuel estimates are model-based and improve with consistent logs and completed sessions. They are not direct lab measurements.

email.desc: Have a specific issue or need private assistance? Send us an email and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
email.title: Email Support

event_sub: Peak for race day with periodized blocks.
feat1_desc: We unite data from all your connected sources into a single, comprehensive view. This solves the "fragmented data" problem.
feat2_desc: Every new workout is analyzed by our AI Coach to extract qualitative insights (e.g., "The athlete struggled with power in the third interval due to potential fatigue").
feat3_desc: These event insights feed into a persistent "Athlete Profile." This living profile evolves daily, tracking fatigue resistance, recovery patterns, and mental resilience.
feat4_desc: When the Daily Coach runs, it reads the Athlete Profile, not just the raw data. This allows it to say "Your recovery is low, and historically you get sick when training in this state" rather than just "HRV is low."
featured_headline: I finally broke the 4 W/kg barrier after years of stagnation.
featured_quote: I was training hard but not smart. Coach Watts analyzed my data and realized I wasn't recovering enough between hard blocks. The AI suggested a polarized approach that completely changed my game.

footer.tagline: AI-powered endurance coaching that adapts to your life, recovery, and goals.

github.desc: Found a bug or have a feature request? Open an issue on our GitHub repository to track its progress and contribute.
github.title: GitHub Issues

guarantee: Paid plans include a 14-day money-back guarantee. No credit card required to start free.

s1_quote: The adaptive planning was a lifesaver. When work got crazy and I missed training, Coach Watts instantly adjusted my plan so I didn't burn out.
s2_quote: Balancing three sports is hard. The integration with Whoop helped me understand exactly how much strain I could handle on the bike without wrecking my run.
s3_quote: I thought I had to train hard every day to keep up. Coach Watts taught me the power of recovery. I'm riding faster now than I was in my 40s.
s4_quote: I used to be 'all or nothing'. This app gives me realistic daily goals that I can actually hit. The consistency has compounded into huge gains.
s5_quote: The race analysis features helped me understand my power curve better. I know exactly when to launch my sprint now.
s6_quote: For multi-day events, fatigue management is key. The readiness score was spot on every single day.

no-fuel.name: No Pre-Fuel
no-fuel.note: Without targeted carbs before the session, you enter the workout near the low-fuel zone and fade early.

pre-60.name: +60g Pre
pre-60.note: A pre-session carb hit lifts your starting fuel and helps sustain quality through the main set.

pre-plus-intra.name: +60g Pre +30g Intra
pre-plus-intra.note: Combining pre and intra fueling gives the smoothest curve and the strongest finish for hard work.

step1_desc: Connect your training and nutrition apps. We combine Strava, Whoop, Garmin, Yazio, and more into one performance timeline.
step2_desc: Our AI models fatigue, recovery, and fuel availability so you can see what standard charts miss.
step3_desc: Get pre, intra, and post-workout fueling targets with carbs, fluids, and sodium based on your actual training load.
step4_desc: Receive specific actions for training and nutrition. Know whether to push, recover, or refuel before your next key session.
step4_quote: "Fuel low for threshold work. Add 60g carbs 90min pre-ride."
subtitle: We're here to help. Choose the channel that works best for you.
t1_quote: "I finally broke the 4 W/kg barrier after years of stagnation. The AI insights identified exactly where I was overtraining."
t2_quote: "The adaptive planning saved my season when work got crazy. It automatically adjusted my week so I didn't burn out. It's like having a pro coach in my pocket, but one that actually understands I have a job."
t3_quote: "Transparency means I can trust the algorithms. No black boxes, just pure data science applied to my physiology."
tagline: Train by watts. Fuel by physiology.
